properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I lay my life down at your feet 'Cause you're the only one I need I turn to You and You are always there

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: In troubled times, it's You I seek I put You first, that's all I need I humble all I am all to You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: One way, Jesus, You're the only one that I could live for One way, Jesus, You're the only one that I could live for

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You are always, always there Everyhow and everywhere Your grace abounds so deeply within me

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You will never, ever change Yesterday, today the same Forever till forever meets no end

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: One way, Jesus, You're the only one that I could live for One way, Jesus, You're the only one that I could live for One way, Jesus, You're the only one that I could live for One way, Jesus, You're the only one that I could live for

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: You are the way, the truth and the life I live by faith and not by sight for You We're livin' all for You You are the way, the truth and the life I live by faith and not by sight for You We're livin' all for You You are the way, the truth and the life We live by faith and not by sight for You We're livin' all for You You are the way, the truth and the life We live by faith and not by sight for You We're livin' all for You

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: One way, Jesus, You're the only one that I could live for One way, Jesus, You're the only one that I should live for One way, Jesus, You're the only one that I could live for One way, Jesus, You're the only one that I could live for
